name: P-3 eval-history output records the eval_pass_rate field per the architecture regression-gating contract
command: mkdir -p evals/datasets/agents && printf '{"id":"r1","input":"x","expected":"y"}\n{"id":"r2","input":"a","expected":"b"}\n' > evals/datasets/agents/test-agent.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-eval.sh" test-agent --version 1.0.0 2>/dev/null && grep -q 'eval_pass_rate' prompts/eval-history/test-agent/1.0.0.json && echo recorded 1>&2
